text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the bus to summer camp, I can't help but feel
nervous about the upcoming race against Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright assures me it'll be fine, but we don't
have a solid plan for how to compete against her
unnatural speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To face off against an opponent as incredible as
Silence Suzuka, we'll need to rely on the
collective knowledge of the Mejiro family.
